title: Type Approval Regulation for Telecommunications Equipment Connected to Public Telecommunications Networks
summary: Requires telecommunications equipment and radiocommunications equipment, including connected devices and short-range radio devices, to meet technical requirements and obtain type approval before import, supply, sale, distribution, or connection to a public telecommunications network.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.iot_connected_devices: Requires type approval before telecom equipment is imported or connected in Bahrain.
theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.spectrum: Requires type approval before telecom equipment is imported or connected.

notes: Related instruments: Telecommunications Law, National Frequency Plan 2024, Short Range Devices Regulation
